expectations.evidence: 02-websocket-server.md explicitly states: 'We use WebSocket... over SSE because chat is bidirectional — clients send messages and receive them — and WebSocket is a better fit than SSE's one-way push model.'
5 todos: DB schema (01), WS server (02), REST API (03), client state/hooks (04), UI components (05). Clean layered architecture.
05-chat-ui.md has 9 items, 04-chat-client-state.md has 8 items. Tightly coupled items kept together (e.g., Zustand store + all hooks in one todo).
Includes TypeScript type definitions inline, code snippets for server.ts, Zustand state shape, WS message types, specific hook return values.
